programme.title: Savlayachi Janu Savali

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas
programme.desc: S1 , E508 : Driven by Neelambari's trap, local outrage completely surrounds Bhavana. Meanwhile, Jayant attempts to uncover whether Janhavi is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Deep Jyoti
programme.desc: S1 , E68 : The lives of three sisters take a dramatic turn when they marry into a prestigious, wealthy family. Jyoti must navigate family tensions to solve the mystery of her brother's death.

programme.title: Krantijyoti Vidyalay Marathi Madhyam
programme.desc: A Marathi-medium school faces closure as student numbers dwindle, prompting teachers and alumni to unite in a determined effort to preserve its legacy and culture.

programme.title: Sanai Chaughade
programme.desc: S1 , E5 : Jay presents Sakshi with a unique present. Later, Samaira, Uma's daughter, who has an aversion to Pramila's family, forces them to take a bus to Akash's wedding venue.

programme.title: Mini
programme.desc: When a young girl's mother falls ill and is admitted to a hospital, her aunt takes care of her, and soon they develop a strong bonding.

programme.title: Sati Behula
programme.desc: Savitri is a devoted wife who roams about with her differently abled husband and stands by him despite his difficulties.

programme.title: Annaye Atyachar
programme.desc: An inebriated Udayan spends a night with his friend's daughter, Kunti, mistaking her to be his wife. He leaves unaware the next morning, setting off a chain of chaotic events.

programme.title: Jeevan Yudh
programme.desc: In order to find his father's killer, Rohit goes back to his hometown. When he meets the new police officer, he unravels a dark truth.

programme.title: Guru Dakshina

programme.title: Abhimaan
programme.desc: After disowning his daughter years ago, an elderly businessman now seeks the help of his grandson to mend his relationship with her.

programme.title: Mayer Adhikar
programme.desc: Tarulatha Chowdhury runs her business with her manager, Milesh. Joy is the only son of Mrs. Chowdhury. Through some conspiracy, Joy meets with an accident. Asha helps Joy recover and they both fall in love.

programme.title: Inspector Notty K
programme.desc: Notty, a police constable eager for promotion, agrees to his boss's request to bring the boss's daughter home from Italy, hoping this task will lead to career advancement.

programme.title: Mission Raniganj: The Great Bharat Rescue
programme.desc: Mission Raniganj - 2023 - Mining engineer Jaswant Singh Gill leads a challenging rescue mission to save 65 miners trapped in a flooded coal mine.

programme.title: Heropanti 2
programme.desc: A vigilante is sent on a mission by the government to kill enemy troops. However, things go wrong when he's mistaken for the leader of the troops.

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Inspector Chulbul Pandey oversees the operations of the local police station in Kanpur. However, things take a turn when he kills the brother of a local politician.

programme.title: Operation Fryday
programme.desc: Police informer Ghulam holds the force responsible when his brother gets killed in a gang war. As he then kick-starts his own business, he wrongfully gets involved in a series of bomb attacks.

programme.title: Main Tera Hero
programme.desc: Seenu and Sunaina fall in love after he saves her from a violent policeman. However, their love story takes a turn when a gangster's daughter wants to marry Seenu.

programme.title: City Lights
programme.desc: Deepak Singh, an ex-army person from Rajasthan, moves to Mumbai with his family hoping for a better lifestyle. However, upon arrival, he realises that everything is not as easy as it seems.

programme.title: Bhoothnath
programme.desc: A rhythmic exchange of silly pranks and shenanigans begins after a young boy and his family move into a house inhabited by a grumpy old ghost.

programme.title: Bawaal
programme.desc: A small-town man falls in love with the prettiest girl in town. However, he ends up marrying her in order to raise his social standing.

programme.title: Drishyam
programme.desc: When the disappearance of a policewoman's son threatens to ruin Vijay's family, he leaves no stone unturned in order to shield his family.

programme.title: Desi Boyz
programme.desc: Two desi hunks become high-profile escorts when the economy hits the skids. Money soon pours in, but everything else in their lives starts falling apart.
